title: Sporting and athletic product safety - Canada.ca
content:
## Sporting and athletic product safety
Safety tips for ice skating, trampolines and inflatable play structures, and sports gear.

## Services and information
Learn tips for choosing the right helmet and how to wear helmets safely.

### Winter sports and recreation safety
Learn how to reduce the risk of injuries and stay safe during winter sports and recreation activities.

### Backyard trampoline and inflatable play structure safety
Learn about the risks associated with trampolines and inflatable play structures and steps for safer use.
